transcript.text:
Should I start with 10 servings?
[Her signature dish: Gopchang (beef small intestines)]
Just in case you can't finish everything What?
Excuse me,
2 orders of beef tongue, 1 order of beef heart, 1 order of fried rice
I think you ate a whole cow
Hello everyone
Before I go to work today,
I'm going to eat lunch
I had food poisoning recently, so I was not feeling too well
So I'm going to eat some gopchang to bring my stamina up again
They specialize in gopchang (beef small intestines)
Hello, Oh hi, welcome
Can we film in here?
Right now? Of course
I've seen that you like gopchang

Have you tried our spicy rice cake?
Yes I have
I went there 2 times
This area has been doing really well all thanks to you
A lot of young people are around now
Thank you
10 servings of gopchang,
1 order of beef abomasum and 1 order of tripe for now
Thank you
It's been a while
I eat gopchang pretty often
They come out pre-cooked
The inside is completely filled
I want to hurry and eat already
This is crazy It's dripping
It looks ready Let's try it

I want to eat it like this Noodle slurp
Delicious
It's so savory This is why people eat gopchang
The servers usually cook for you Not today because I'm filming
2 of them
[This needs to be captured]
[Director Tzuyang! It's out of focus!]
Stew
It's really good
I love it
It tastes especially good because it's raining outside
Gopchang train
Tasty
This is really bringing me back to life
I feel completely recovered from the sickness now
Put some garlic on top

Since I cooked it extra crispy,
The outer layer feels thinner
It's easier to chew
Is it usually like this?
Lettuce leaf
Let's make a wrap
Very tiny lettuce leaf
It tastes great
They cook these, so let's ask
[Let the owner cook]
[Let Director Tzuyang film]
Where's the power button?
[Around this much?]
You can put more
Thank you
I forgot to press 'record'

[Fire show]
I've never cooked this many at once
Fire
[Making a wall]
It's okay
Thank you
I've never stacked this many before either
Thank you It looks nicely cooked
I'm a cameraman today
It's pretty fun
Can't believe you guys enjoyed this without me
The fat
It's filled
[Director Tzu, it's out of focus again!]
It's out of focus
I quit

This is not fun
So good
It tastes better since they cooked it
4 pieces of gopchang
It's not greasy It's savory
Who says gopchang is greasy?
A lot of people can't eat too much gopchang because of the greasiness
But I don't get it
It's so good
Let's ask the owner again
I want some beef tongue and large intestines
Just for a quick break
Or was it abomasum?
Excuse me,
This is beef tongue and..
This is the large intestine Did you order abomasum tripe?

We brought out the wrong one
[She didn't know either]
I can get you abomasum, but
Just worried that you can't finish it
What?
[Right, it's Tzuyang]
Just a second
I'm today's cameraman
Let's eat the beef tongue
This is so tender
I'm used to eating 2 pieces at once, but I'll do 1 at a time
Wait, I can order more
It tastes so good
I've never had beef tongue this chewy
Now for the abomasum tripe
I've never had this before

It looks strange
Pretty unique, right?
That's very interesting
So good
Its texture is softer than the reed tripe
More savory than the small intestines
Crispy on the outside, tender and chewy on the inside
Beef heart now
This is a very big piece It's usually pretty small
Perfect
I'm good at this
It's so good
Never knew the beef heart was this tasty
The texture is..
Crunchy, yet chewy Just like the tripe
Jungwon's photo time

My heart..
So good
Beef heart and beef tongue
Amazing
Move all of them
All at once
All of them
Just to film a perfect scene
It tastes better when the mushroom is cute this way instead
It's juicier like this
Beef tongue Don't get cold
Personally, I think the beef tongue is the best
It's a very eye-opening flavor
I don't want to film anymore
I'm going to eat, I'm hungry
Should I help you cook?

Thank you
I want to film this
I did a good job, right? Yes
Since I cook kbbq a lot
A well-cooked mushroom
With gopchang
Stomach tripe and large intestines, please
This can be my main job now
I filmed it really well
It looks so good I love the tripe
Delicious
Can you hear that?
It's so chewy
You can feel the grain
Like a chewy mushroom
Large intestines

It's already seasoned, so dipping sauce isn't necessary
Let's make the large intestine train
3 pieces this time
Excuse me,
2 orders of beef tongue and 1 order of beef heart, please
Really impressive
Thank you, just a second
I'm ready
That's big
[Not letting the camera go]
So good
I expected the heart to be rubbery
But it's not like that at all
Do I call this marbling? Does the beef tongue have marbling?
You need some coke?
How did you know I needed more? I just know

From like the angle?
Thank you
Beef tongue train
So juicy
[Last bite]
Excuse me,
Can I get the tripe fried rice?
I've watched all of your YouTube videos Really?
You're so good at eating
You don't disappoint
Thank you
[Scraping the scorched rice]
So good

Coke? Okay
Thank you

You know right away
Last bite
Amazing

But it's almost nighttime now
